titleStmt.title: SII 42.2: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 2. (A.R. No. B. 2 of 1953-54.) Chilamakūru, Tadipatri Taluk, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone in front of the Ellamma temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1[418] • • • • ., Māgha, ba. 30, Monday, Solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1496, February 14.

Damaged. Records the gift of the village [Kōmaṭi]guṇṭla alias Narasiṁhapuram belonging to Niṭṭūri-sīma under Chirabaḍi-(sīma) for the merit of Kaṭhāri Sāḷuva Narasingarāya mahārāya to goddess Akaḷā Paramēśvarī of Chilumakūru. The donor seems to be [Naṁḍāni-nāyanigāru]. The goddess is described as ādhāra-śakti, lōka-mātā, arivīra-Aṅkāḷa-Chaṇḍī. The inscription refers to the following villages as boundaries: Niṭṭūru, Mēḍikuṟṟu, Mallēpalli, Chāluvēmula and Puṭlūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of Cresent-moon, tirunāmaṁ and sun.

svasti śrī śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1418 pa
saṁvatsara māga(gha) ba 30 sō śrīmaṁnmahā
maṁḍalēśvara mēdinīmīsaragaṁḍa kaṭāri sāḷuva na
rasiṁgarāya mahārāyalku(laku) pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁgānu naṁḍāni
nāyanigāru Ādhāraśakti lōkamāṁta(māta) yarivīra Aṁkāḷa
caṁḍḍi cilumakūri yakalā paramēśvariki yiccina bhūdāna
dharma śāśa(sa)naṁ .cirabaḍilōni niṭūrisīmaku cellē kōmaṭi
guṁṭla Anē pratināmaṁ Ayina nārasihya(narasiṁha)puraṁ Ama(mā)vāsya sū
ryyagrahaṇa pu(ṁ)ṇyakālamaṁdu dīpadhūpa nayi(nai)vēdyānaku dhā
ravōsi yistimi . Āgrāmānagala Aṭuvaṁṭivi nidhinikṣēpa
jalapāśā(ṣā)ṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddhā(ddha)sādhya Anēṭi Aṣṭabhōga
tējasvāmyatalanu sahiraṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvvakaṁgānu
Ācaṁdrārkastā(sthā)yigānu dhāraŌ(vō)si yistimi . gāna yī
grāmānku catussīma polaṁmēralunnu . tūrppuku niṭū
ri mēḍikuriti polaṁmēra . dakṣiṇānaku mallēpalli polaṁ
mēra . paḍumaṭi cāluvēmula polaṁmēra . vuta(Utta)rāna
puṭlūru polaṁmēra . yī grāmānnu(nku)mucu cicu
suṁkhariyavakarannu boka(cora)rādu maṁgaḷamahā
śrī śrī śrī . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ(m) . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁbha
vēt .
Digital edition of SII 42.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
